channel.title: Kubernetes on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Kubernetes on jamesm.blog

item.title: Platform Engineering in 2026: What It Is and Why DevOps Teams Are Adopting It
item.description: A practical guide to platform engineering in 2026 - what an internal developer platform actually is, why DevOps teams are adopting it, and how AI agents are reshaping the discipline.

item.title: Mac Homebrew packages
item.description: Comprehensive list of essential Homebrew packages for macOS development, DevOps, cloud tools, and command-line utilities.

item.title: DevOps Cheatsheets
item.description: Quick reference guides and cheatsheets for DevOps tools, cloud computing concepts, Linux commands, and Kubernetes operations.

item.title: DevOps GitHub Projects
item.description: Curated collection of essential open-source DevOps projects on GitHub - SRE learning resources, Kubernetes tooling, Linux utilities, and workflow schedulers.

item.title: List of DevOps Courses
item.description: Comprehensive collection of DevOps courses covering AWS, Azure, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD, Linux, and cloud infrastructure training.

item.title: DevOps Books
item.description: Recommended reading list of DevOps and infrastructure engineering books covering culture, cloud, containers, infrastructure as code, SRE, and programming languages.

item.title: AWS re:Invent Slides (2022)
item.description: Curated collection of presentation slide decks from AWS re:Invent 2022, covering DevOps, Kubernetes on EKS, CI/CD, and DevSecOps topics with short practitioner summaries.

item.title: CI/CD Tools
item.description: Overview of popular CI/CD and continuous delivery tools - managed services, self-hosted platforms, and GitOps systems - for automating software builds, testing, and deployments.

item.title: DevOps Conferences
item.description: Guide to major DevOps conferences and summits - KubeCon, DevOpsDays, PlatformCon, AWS re:Invent - covering cloud infrastructure, SRE, and platform engineering.
